Nachos
Corn tortilla chips topped with melted queso, black beans, tomatoes, sour cream and spicy pico de gallo.   Lobster, Steak, Chicken or Veggie
Available in half & full orders.
Gulf Coast Fish Bites
Fresh cut Basa pieces lightly breaded then fried and served with spicy Jack Daniels honey mustard sauce.
Calamari
Lightly fried with fresh jalapenos and okra served with cherry pepper vinaigrette.
Crispy Chicken Wings
Traditional Buffalo style, lemon pepper or spicy BBQ.  Served with celery & bleu cheese or fries & ranch.
Chicken Quesadilla
A crispy flour tortilla filled with grilled chicken, cheese, peppers and onions drizzled with sour cream served with salsa.
Queso Dip
Melted pepper jack cheese topped with spicy pico de gallo alongside crispy corn chips.
Hot Mama Shrimp
Breaded and fried shrimp tossed in our famous wing sauce with a side of homemade bleu cheese dressing.
Flatbreads
On roasted garlic naan.
Pad's Popper
Bacon, andouille sausage, jalapenos, tomatoes and provolone.
Veggie
Julienne veggies tossed with Greek vinaigrette, pesto mayo, and mozzarella.
BBQ Chicken
Grilled BBQ chicken breast, red onion, cheddar jack cheese topped with cilantro and ranch.

Traditional Wedge
Quarter head of iceberg lettuce, diced tomatoes, applewood smoked bacon and house made bleu cheese dressing.

Asian Chicken
Teriyaki glazed grilled chicken, julienne squash, zucchini and carrots on mixed greens topped with fried wonton strips and tossed in sesame soy vinaigrette.
Classic Chicken Caesar
Grilled chicken breast, crisp romaine lettuce, garlic croutons, roasted tomatoes, and parmesan cheese.
Cobb
Turkey, bacon, hard-boiled egg, tomato, avocado, scallions, shredded cheddar, and bleu cheese crumbles atop field greens tossed with champagne vinaigrette.
Fresh Catch
Grilled salmon served over mixed greens with cucumbers, diced tomatoes tossed in champagne vinaigrette.
Fried Chicken
Chopped crispy fried chicken, cheddar jack cheese, tomato and red onion on mixed greens tossed with our honey tabasco vinaigrette.
Entrées
All sandwiches or wraps are served with choice of fries or pasta salad.
Beef on Weck
Sliced roast beef dipped in our au jus on a Kimmelweck roll with a side of horseradish.
California BLT
Applewood smoked bacon, fresh avocado, pesto mayo, lettuce and tomato on wheat bread.
Veggie Wrap
Julienne veggies, mushrooms, peppers, onions, black beans and provolone in a honey wheat tortilla.
Chicken Tenders
Served with honey mustard and fries.

Classic Reuben
Corned beef with 1000 island dressing, sauerkraut and Swiss cheese on marble rye.
Cuban Wrap
Mojo marinated pork loin, black forest ham, pickles, Dijon mustard, and Swiss cheese in a chipotle tortilla.
Hot Ham & Swiss
The name says it all!  Served on a toasted pretzel bun with spicy mustard.
S.H.M.
Tender grilled strip steak, crispy hash browns, mozzarella and horseradish ranch on ciabatta.
Roast Beef Philly
Slices of roast beef with sautéed onions, peppers and mushrooms topped with provolone served on a hoagie roll with a side of au jus.
Hollywood
Grilled marinated chicken breasts smothered with sautéed mushrooms, onions, applewood smoked bacon and Swiss cheese on a toasted Kaiser roll.
Turkey Burger
Served with chipotle mayo and provolone on a Kaiser roll.
Jambalaya Pasta
Grilled chicken, andouille sausage, shrimp, peppers and onions tossed in a Cajun cream sauce.
Burgers
All burgers are 8oz Black Angus and served with choice of fries or pasta salad.

Bistro Chicken
